description_long: This is a compact, three-tiered shelving unit constructed with a dark metal frame and light, weathered wooden planks for each shelf. The frame features cross-bracing on the sides for added stability and a rustic, industrial aesthetic. The shelves are open on all sides, allowing for easy access and visibility of stored items. The top surface is flat and can be used for additional storage or display. In some views, a round, light-colored ceramic or stone vessel is placed adjacent to or on the shelf, suggesting its use for decorative or storage purposes. The overall design is utilitarian yet stylish, suitable for urban outdoor or garage environments.
description: A three-tiered, open metal and wood shelf with a rustic, industrial look. It features cross-braced sides and weathered wooden planks.
description_view_0: Side view showing the cross-braced metal frame and three wooden shelves, with a round vessel to the right.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the open face of the shelving unit and the vessel placed in front of it.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the vessel to the left, highlighting the shelf's depth and cross-bracing.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the shelving unit with the vessel behind it, emphasizing the open structure.
